articles.title: Hyderabad’s rapid urban expansion: Resetting the lines of control
articles.description: From the bustling lanes of its historic core to the glass towers of the western IT corridor and the ever-expanding suburbs beyond, Hyderabad’s rapid growth is testing its administrative limits. As the capital of India’s youngest State grows outwards, the government has overhauled its policing structure, redrawing boundaries, reshaping existing commissionerates and introducing a new one to keep pace with the city’s scale. The move aims to improve oversight and bring policing closer to residents, even as questions remain over coordination and on-ground clarity, write Lavpreet Kaur and Naveen Kumar

articles.description: From the bustling lanes of its historic core to the glass towers of the western IT corridor and the ever-expanding suburbs beyond, Hyderabad’s rapid growth is testing its administrative limits. As the capital of India’s youngest State grows outwards, the government has overhauled its policing structure, redrawing boundaries, reshaping existing commissionerates and introducing a new one to keep pace with the city’s scale. The move aims to improve oversight and bring policing closer to residents, even as questions remain over coordination and on-ground clarity, write Lavpreet Kaur and Naveen Kumar

dailyNews.title: MSMEs tap working capital amid rising input cost pressures
dailyNews.description: MSMEs and other industries are experiencing higher working capital utilization as input costs escalate due to the US-Israel conflict. This trend, driven by slower cash flows and margin pressures, is prompting lenders to ensure adequate liquidity support. Sectors like hospitality, chemicals, and basmati rice exporters are expected to see increased drawdowns and fresh sanctions as they navigate rising costs.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump addressed Iran's reported execution of 19-year-old wrestler Saleh Mohammadi, saying he was killed for speaking against the regime.

dailyNews.title: Schumer, Dems block DHS funding again as Trump intervenes to pay TSA agents
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., said bipartisan DHS shutdown talks are progressing after Republicans sent Democrats what he called a "last and final" funding offer.

dailyNews.title: President Trump insists MAGA 'loves' his war on Iran: 'MAGA people are smart'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said the MAGA base supports his military campaign on Iran during an interview on "The Five," noting that supporters know he's protecting the United States.

dailyNews.description: President Trump’s announcement came as talks on Capitol Hill over funding the Department of Homeland Security faltered, and airport lines continued to grow.

dailyNews.description: President Trump is poised to be the first sitting president to have his signature appear on the U.S. dollar.
